planets.title: Mercury
planets.description: Mercury is the smallest planet and the closest planet to the Sun. It has very hot days and freezing nights.

planets.title: Venus
planets.description: Venus is the hottest planet in the Solar System. It has thick clouds and a toxic atmosphere.

planets.title: Earth
planets.description: Earth is our home planet. It has liquid water, oxygen, and life.

planets.title: Mars
planets.description: Mars is known as the Red Planet. Scientists study Mars because it may have had water in the past.
